title: Gold Prices Surge Past $2,400 as Geopolitical Tensions Escalate
description: Gold hit a new record high above $2,400 per ounce as investors sought safe-haven assets amid rising geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and Eastern Europe.

title: Crude Oil Drops 5% as OPEC+ Considers Production Increase
description: Oil prices fell sharply after reports that OPEC+ members are considering unwinding production cuts earlier than expected, potentially adding significant supply to global markets.
